knowledge_base.summary: Buyer claims an order has not arrived, or there is a problem with tracking or delivery.
trigger_phrases: buyer says they didn't get it
tracking shows delivered but buyer didn't receive it
resolution_steps: Check the order tracking information first.
If there is no tracking or the item hasn't shipped yet, message the seller directly.
If it has been fewer than 5 days since the order was placed, wait for the seller to ship and check back.
If it has been more than 5 days with no update, raise an issue in the Depop app.
If you paid via PayPal, open a dispute through PayPal instead.
If using Depop Shipping and tracking hasn't updated after 10 days, contact Depop support.
Buyers have up to 30 days from purchase to report an order as not arrived.
escalation_triggers: Tracking shows delivered but buyer insists item was not received after 5 days
Seller has not responded within 48 hours of issue being raised
Package is confirmed lost or damaged via Depop Shipping
Buyer cannot access their Depop account to raise the issue
Order value is significant and seller is unresponsive

knowledge_base.summary: Buyer received an item that is significantly different from the listing description or photos.
trigger_phrases: item looks different from the photos
item has damage that wasn't mentioned
major flaw not shown in listing
item is different from what was listed
missing parts not mentioned in listing
resolution_steps: Check whether the issue qualifies as significantly not as described. Covered issues include: wrong size, wrong colour, major undisclosed damage, missing bundle items, or counterfeit items.
Issues NOT covered include: smells, minor wear on second-hand items, material feel differences, fit preferences, or changing your mind.
If the issue is covered, raise a dispute in the Depop app within 30 days of purchase.
Provide clear photos and a written description of the problem when raising the issue.
Keep the item — do not return it until Depop confirms a return is required.
If a return is approved, send it back within 7 days using tracked delivery and update the tracking in the app.
If you paid via PayPal, open a Not as Described dispute through PayPal directly.
escalation_triggers: Seller has not responded within 48 hours of the issue being raised — Depop automatically escalates
Item was bought as part of a bundle
Dispute requires Depop to review evidence and make a decision
PayPal dispute has been completed and issue remains unresolved
not_covered: Minor wear expected on second-hand items

knowledge_base.summary: Buyer believes the item they received is counterfeit or not authentic.
resolution_steps: Authenticity claims are treated as a significantly not as described dispute.
Do not return the item until Depop has reviewed the case.
Raise a dispute in the Depop app within 30 days, selecting the relevant reason.
Provide clear photos of the item, including any branding, labels, stitching, and hardware that suggest inauthenticity.
Include a written description explaining why you believe the item is not authentic.
Depop will review the evidence and make a decision — do not contact the seller directly about authenticity claims.
escalation_triggers: All authenticity claims require Depop support review — this category always escalates
Seller disputes the claim and provides counter-evidence
Item value is high enough to warrant further investigation

knowledge_base.summary: Buyer is requesting a refund, or seller needs to issue one. Includes changed-mind returns and post-dispute refunds.
trigger_phrases: can I get my money back
how do I refund a buyer
I don't want the item anymore
how long does a refund take
resolution_steps: Refunds are only guaranteed if the item is confirmed as not as described or not received.
If the buyer changed their mind, Depop does not require sellers to accept a return. Ask the seller if they will make an exception.
If the seller agrees, return the item within 7 days using tracked delivery.
If the seller refuses a changed-mind return, the buyer can resell the item via Depop.
For sellers issuing a refund: go to the sold order in the app and select the refund option for Depop Payments orders.
For PayPal orders, refunds must be issued through PayPal directly.
Sellers can issue full or partial refunds depending on the situation.
After refunding a buyer for a PayPal order, sellers can contact support to request a Depop fee refund.
escalation_triggers: Refund cannot be processed through the app
Dispute has been reviewed and refund is owed but not received
Seller issued a refund through PayPal and needs the Depop fee returned
Buyer and seller cannot agree on whether a return is warranted
knowledge_base.note: Changed-mind returns are not covered by Depop Buyer Protection. Only INAD and non-delivery cases are guaranteed.

knowledge_base.summary: Seller has completed a sale but has not received their payment or payout.
trigger_phrases: sold an item but not paid
balance shows zero after a sale
resolution_steps: For Depop Payments orders: wait 2 business days after the order is marked as delivered.
For manual shipping orders: allow up to 10 days after delivery confirmation.
Check that your bank account details are connected, verified, and correct in the app.
Check that your Depop Balance is not negative — a negative balance will delay payouts.
For PayPal orders: check your PayPal account directly, as Depop does not control PayPal payouts.
Check that no refunds or disputes are open on the order, as these can hold payments.
escalation_triggers: Payment is still missing after 2 business days (Depop Payments) or 10 days (manual shipping)
Bank details are correct but payout has not arrived
Depop Balance appears incorrect or shows an unexpected deduction
A dispute or refund is blocking the payout and the seller needs clarification

knowledge_base.summary: User does not recognise a fee or charge, has questions about their Depop Balance, or needs help with payment setup.
trigger_phrases: I haven't been charged a fee yet
how do I set up direct debit
resolution_steps: For unrecognised fees: check the order receipt or sales receipt in the app for a full fee breakdown.
Depop charges a selling fee on each transaction. Boosted Listing fees apply if a buyer purchased within 28 days of viewing a boosted item.
PayPal fees can take up to 21 days to appear — check back before contacting support.
For negative Depop Balance: add funds through your connected payment method to clear the balance.
For Depop Balance queries: go to Balance in the app to view all transactions, sales, refunds, and payouts.
UK sellers using Depop Payments need to set up a direct debit to cover refunds if their balance is insufficient.
Top-up cards can be added or removed in payment settings.
escalation_triggers: Fee cannot be identified after checking all receipts and transactions
Balance adjustment appears incorrect and requires review
Direct debit setup is failing
Boosted Listing fee appears to have been charged incorrectly

knowledge_base.summary: User has received a suspicious message, been asked to pay outside the app, shared personal information, or experienced abusive behaviour.
trigger_phrases: someone asked me to pay outside Depop
I want to report a user
someone asked for my personal details
resolution_steps: Never pay or communicate outside the Depop app — all transactions and messages should stay within Depop.
If you received a suspicious email, check it came from an official Depop email address. Do not click links or open attachments.
If you clicked a suspicious link or shared personal details: contact your bank immediately if payment details were entered, enable two-factor authentication, and update any reused passwords.
Check your account for any unauthorised changes.
Report suspicious users or listings through the app by selecting Report on the relevant profile or listing.
To block a user, go to their profile and select Block.
If you paid outside the app, report the seller immediately and provide proof of purchase.
escalation_triggers: Personal or financial information was shared with a suspicious party
Account security may be compromised
Payment was made outside the app and item not received
User is experiencing harassment, threats, or abusive behaviour
Serious safety concern that cannot be resolved through the app
knowledge_base.note: Payments made outside the Depop app are not covered by Depop Buyer Protection. Always escalate fraud and safety issues to support.

knowledge_base.summary: The user's issue does not clearly map to a single category, or contains conflicting signals that prevent confident classification.
trigger_phrases: the item arrived but it's also late
I think it might be fake but it also looks damaged
my account is suspended and I have an open dispute
I paid outside the app but also raised an issue in the app
the seller refunded me but I still haven't got the money
resolution_steps: This issue doesn't fit clearly into a single category.
To make sure you get the right help, this will be passed to a Depop support agent who can review the full details.
Please have your order number, relevant screenshots, and a description of the issue ready.
escalation_triggers: Always escalates — ambiguous cases require human review
knowledge_base.note: This is the deliberate failure case. The agent surfaces uncertainty rather than guessing, and escalates with a clear handoff summary.
